query: SELECT userId, plan, status, trialStartedAt, trialDays, DATEDIFF(NOW(), trialStartedAt) as daysPassed, trialDays - DATEDIFF(NOW(), trialStartedAt) as trialDaysLeft FROM subscriptions WHERE userId = 1170001;
